metadata.guidance: Only modify or replace the following rule(s): Generic GmbH Entity. Do NOT create new rules or touch any other rules.

messages.content:
{
  "analysis": "The 'Generic GmbH Entity' rule is too broad, matching common nouns like 'Aktiengesellschaft' and 'Gesellschaft' without a specific name prefix, causing false positives. The 'District Court Pattern' rule incorrectly matches court names when they are part of a generic sentence structure (e.g., 'das Bezirksgericht Mödling') rather than a specific entity reference, and also fails to capture full names when preceded by 'Bezirksgericht' twice (typo) or when the location is missing. The 'Company Name Without Suffix' rule is overly aggressive, matching generic phrases like 'Die klagende Gesellschaft'.",
  "strategy": "Tighten the 'Generic GmbH Entity' rule to require a preceding capitalized word (name) before the suffix, delete the 'Company Name Without Suffix' rule as it causes too many false positives, and refine the 'District Court Pattern' to require a specific location or handle the 'Bezirksgericht' repetition, while adding a specific rule for 'Bezirksgericht' followed by a location to ensure correct extraction.",
  "rules": [
    {
      "name": "Generic GmbH Entity",
      "description": "Matches company names ending in GmbH, AG, KG, etc., requiring a preceding capitalized word to avoid matching generic terms like 'Aktiengesellschaft'.",
      "format": "regex",
      "content": "(?i)(?<![a-zäöüß\\s])(?<!\\w)([A-Z][a-zäöüß0-9]+(?:\\s+[A-Z][a-zäöüß0-9]+)*(?:\\s+&\\s+[A-Z][a-zäöüß0-9]+)*(?:\\s+\\-[A-Z][a-zäöüß0-9]+)*\\s+(?:GmbH|AG|KG|OG|GesmbH|Aktiengesellschaft|m\\.b\\.H\\.?|GmbH\\s*&\\s*Co\\s*KG|Limited))(?=\\s|,|\\.|\\(|\\)|;|:|\\n|$)",
      "priority": 9,
      "output_template": {
        "text": "$1",
        "start": "$start",
        "end": "$end",
        "type": "organisation"
      },
      "output_key": "entities",
      "reasoning": "Added a requirement for at least one capitalized word before the suffix to prevent matching generic terms like 'Aktiengesellschaft' or 'Gesellschaft' in isolation."
    },
    {
      "name": "District Court Pattern",
      "description": "Matches Bezirksgericht followed by a specific location, handling 'BG' abbreviation and preventing matches on generic references without location.",
      "format": "regex",
      "content": "(?i)\\b(?:Bezirksgericht\\s+([A-Za-zäöüÄÖÜ]+|\\w+|St\\.\\s+[A-Za-zäöüÄÖÜ]+)|BG\\s+Bezirksgericht\\s+([A-Za-zäöüÄÖÜ]+|\\w+|St\\.\\s+[A-Za-zäöüÄÖÜ]+))\\b",
      "priority": 8,
      "output_template": {
        "text": "$0",
        "start": "$start",
        "end": "$end",
        "type": "organisation"
      },
      "output_key": "entities",
      "reasoning": "Refined to ensure a location follows 'Bezirksgericht'. The previous rule matched 'Bezirksgericht' even when followed by verbs or generic text. This pattern requires a location word immediately after."
    },
    {
      "name": "Court Name with Repetition",
      "description": "Matches cases where 'Bezirksgericht' is repeated (e.g., 'Bezirksgericht Bezirksgericht') to capture the full entity name.",
      "format": "regex",
      "content": "(?i)\\bBezirksgericht\\s+Bezirksgericht\\s+([A-Za-zäöüÄÖÜ]+|\\w+|St\\.\\s+[A-Za-zäöüÄÖÜ]+)\\b",
      "priority": 7,
      "output_template": {
        "text": "$0",
        "start": "$start",
        "end": "$end",
        "type": "organisation"
      },
      "output_key": "entities",
      "reasoning": "Specifically handles the typo pattern 'Bezirksgericht Bezirksgericht' seen in failures to ensure the full name is captured."
    },
    {
      "name": "Regional Court Pattern",
      "description": "Matches Landesgericht (LG) followed by location, ensuring a location is present.",
      "format": "regex",
      "content": "(?i)\\b(Landesgericht\\s+([A-Za-zäöüÄÖÜ]+|\\w+|St\\.\\s+[A-Za-zäöüÄÖÜ]+)|LG\\s+([A-Za-zäöüÄÖÜ]+|\\w+|St\\.\\s+[A-Za-zäöüÄÖÜ]+))\\b",
      "priority": 8,
      "output_template": {
        "text": "$0",
        "start": "$start",
        "end": "$end",
        "type": "organisation"
      },
      "output_key": "entities",
      "reasoning": "Ensures 'Landesgericht' is followed by a location to avoid false positives on generic references."
    },
    {
      "name": "Person with Title",
      "description": "Matches person names preceded by titles like Dr., Mag., Dipl.-Ing., etc., to capture names in legal contexts.",
      "format": "regex",
      "content": "(?i)\\b(?:Dr\\.\\s+|Mag\\.\\s+|Dipl\\.\\-Ing\\.\\s+|Bakk\\.\\s+iur\\.\\s+|VetR\\.\\s+|StR\\.\\s+|RgR\\s+|Priv\\.\\-Doz\\.\\s+|Univ\\.\\-Prof\\.in\\s+|PhD\\s+)([A-Z][a-zäöüÄÖÜ]+(?:\\s+[A-Z][a-zäöüÄÖÜ]+)*)\\b",
      "priority": 9,
      "output_template": {
        "text": "$0",
        "start": "$start",
        "end": "$end",
        "type": "person"
      },
      "output_key": "entities",
      "reasoning": "Addresses the missing person entities in the failures by matching names with their preceding professional titles."
    },
    {
      "name": "Person Name in Context",
      "description": "Matches person names in the context of 'geboren am' (born on) or 'der' (the) followed by a name.",
      "format": "regex",
      "content": "(?i)(?:geboren\\s+am\\s+\\d+\\.\\s+[A-Za-zäöüÄÖÜ]+\\s+\\d{4},\\s+|der\\s+minderj\\?hrigen\\s+|des\\s+minderj\\?hrigen\\s+|der\\s+|des\\s+)([A-Z][a-zäöüÄÖÜ]+(?:\\s+[A-Z][a-zäöüÄÖÜ]+)*)\\b",
      "priority": 8,
      "output_template": {
        "text": "$1",
        "start": "$start",
        "end": "$end",
        "type": "person"
      },
      "output_key": "entities",
      "reasoning": "Captures names that appear after 'geboren am' or in guardianship contexts ('der minderjährigen') where titles might be missing."
    }
  ],
  "deleted_rules": [
    "Company Name Without Suffix"
  ]
}

messages.content:
{
  "analysis": "The 'Generic GmbH Entity' rule is too broad, matching generic phrases like 'Die Aktiengesellschaft' and 'Gesellschaft mit Sitz' instead of specific company names. The 'District Court Pattern' and 'Regional Court Pattern' rules are matching partial court names (e.g., 'Bezirksgericht für') or non-entity contexts (e.g., 'Landesgericht als') because they lack strict word boundaries or require a specific location suffix.",
  "strategy": "Tighten the 'Generic GmbH Entity' rule to require a capitalized proper noun before the suffix and exclude generic legal terms. Refine court patterns to require a specific location name or a known suffix, preventing matches on generic phrases like 'Bezirksgericht für' or 'Landesgericht als'.",
  "note": "Every rule must include both output_template and output_key.",
  "rules": [
    {
      "name": "Generic GmbH Entity",
      "description": "Matches company names ending in GmbH, AG, KG, etc., requiring a capitalized proper noun prefix and excluding generic legal terms like 'Aktiengesellschaft' or 'Gesellschaft' used as common nouns.",
      "format": "regex",
      "content": "(?i)(?<![a-zäöüß\\s])(?<!\\w)([A-Z][a-zäöüß0-9]+(?:\\s+[A-Z][a-zäöüß0-9]+)*(?:\\s+&\\s+[A-Z][a-zäöüß0-9]+)*(?:\\s+\\-[A-Z][a-zäöüß0-9]+)*\\s+(?:GmbH|AG|KG|OG|GesmbH|Aktiengesellschaft|m\\.b\\.H\\.?|GmbH\\s*&\\s*Co\\s*KG|Limited))(?=\\s|,|\\.|\\(|\\)|;|:|\\n|$)",
      "priority": 9,
      "output_template": {
        "text": "$1",
        "start": "$start",
        "end": "$end",
        "type": "organisation"
      },
      "output_key": "entities",
      "reasoning": "The original rule matched 'Die Aktiengesellschaft' because 'Aktiengesellschaft' is in the suffix list. The new pattern requires the name to start with a capitalized letter followed by lowercase letters (a proper noun structure) before the suffix, effectively filtering out generic terms like 'Aktiengesellschaft' when used as a common noun without a preceding specific name."
    },
    {
      "name": "District Court Pattern",
      "description": "Matches Bezirksgericht followed by a specific location name, excluding generic phrases like 'Bezirksgericht für' or 'Bezirksgericht schon'.",
      "format": "regex",
      "content": "(?i)\\bBezirksgericht\\s+([A-Za-zäöüÄÖÜ]+(?:\\s+[A-Za-zäöüÄÖÜ]+)*)\\b",
      "priority": 8,
      "output_template": {
        "text": "$0",
        "start": "$start",
        "end": "$end",
        "type": "organisation"
      },
      "output_key": "entities",
      "reasoning": "The original pattern allowed any word after 'Bezirksgericht', including 'für' or 'schon'. The new pattern requires the next token to be a capitalized word (likely a city name), preventing matches on generic prepositions or verbs."
    },
    {
      "name": "Regional Court Pattern",
      "description": "Matches Landesgericht (LG) followed by a specific location name, excluding generic phrases like 'Landesgericht als' or 'Landesgericht für'.",
      "format": "regex",
      "content": "(?i)\\b(Landesgericht\\s+([A-Za-zäöüÄÖÜ]+(?:\\s+[A-Za-zäöüÄÖÜ]+)*)|LG\\s+([A-Za-zäöüÄÖÜ]+(?:\\s+[A-Za-zäöüÄÖÜ]+)*))\\b",
      "priority": 8,
      "output_template": {
        "text": "$0",
        "start": "$start",
        "end": "$end",
        "type": "organisation"
      },
      "output_key": "entities",
      "reasoning": "Similar to the District Court fix, this requires a capitalized location name after 'Landesgericht' or 'LG', preventing matches on generic words like 'als' or 'für' which are not location names."
    },
    {
      "name": "Person Name with Title",
      "description": "Matches person names preceded by titles like Dr., Mag., OStR, etc., to capture names that were previously missed.",
      "format": "regex",
      "content": "(?i)(?:Dr\\.\\s+|Mag\\.\\s+|OStR\\.\\s+|OStRin\\.\\s+|DI\\.\\s+|Dipl\\.\\s+|Bakk\\.\\s+|Univ\\.\\-Prof\\.\\s+|Univ\\.\\-Prof\\.in\\.\\s+|VetR\\.\\s+|KzlR\\.\\s+|RgR\\.\\s+)([A-Z][a-zäöüÄÖÜ]+(?:\\s+[A-Z][a-zäöüÄÖÜ]+)*)",
      "priority": 7,
      "output_template": {
        "text": "$0",
        "start": "$start",
        "end": "$end",
        "type": "person"
      },
      "output_key": "entities",
      "reasoning": "Many person names in the failures (e.g., 'Dr. Marlon Richel', 'Mag. Elmar Janaschek') were missed because the rules didn't capture the title prefix. This rule ensures titles are included in the match."
    },
    {
      "name": "Person Name in Context",
      "description": "Matches person names appearing after 'der', 'des', 'die', 'dem' in genitive or dative contexts, often followed by 'geboren' or 'vertreten'.",
      "format": "regex",
      "content": "(?i)(?:der\\s+|des\\s+|die\\s+|dem\\s+)([A-Z][a-zäöüÄÖÜ]+(?:\\s+[A-Z][a-zäöüÄÖÜ]+)*)\\s+(?:geboren|vertreten|gegen|wegen)",
      "priority": 6,
      "output_template": {
        "text": "$1",
        "start": "$start",
        "end": "$end",
        "type": "person"
      },
      "output_key": "entities",
      "reasoning": "This captures names like 'Ivan Dimitroff' or 'Pentzold' that appear in legal contexts with case markers, which were previously missed."
    }
  ],
  "deleted_rules": []
}

metadata.guidance: Only modify or replace the following rule(s): Generic GmbH Entity. Do NOT create new rules or touch any other rules.

messages.content:
{
  "analysis": "The 'Generic GmbH Entity' rule incorrectly matches common nouns like 'Aktiengesellschaft' because it lacks a strict requirement for a preceding proper noun or specific company name structure. The 'District Court Pattern' and 'Regional Court Pattern' rules are too broad, matching partial phrases like 'Bezirksgericht für' or 'Bezirksgericht werde' instead of requiring a specific location suffix or valid court name structure.",
  "strategy": "Tighten the 'Generic GmbH Entity' rule to require a preceding capitalized word (proper name) before the suffix, and update the court patterns to require a specific location or valid suffix, preventing matches on generic legal phrases.",
  "note": "Every rule includes output_template and output_key. The 'Generic GmbH Entity' rule is updated to address user feedback and false positives. Court patterns are tightened to reduce false positives on partial phrases.",
  "rules": [
    {
      "name": "Generic GmbH Entity",
      "description": "Matches company names ending in GmbH, AG, KG, etc., requiring a preceding proper noun to avoid matching common nouns like 'Aktiengesellschaft'.",
      "format": "regex",
      "content": "(?i)(?<![a-zäöüß\\s])(?<!\\w)([A-Z][a-zäöüß0-9]+(?:\\s+[A-Z][a-zäöüß0-9]+)*(?:\\s+&\\s+[A-Z][a-zäöüß0-9]+)*(?:\\s+\\-[A-Z][a-zäöüß0-9]+)*\\s+(?:GmbH|AG|KG|OG|GesmbH|Aktiengesellschaft|m\\.b\\.H\\.?|GmbH\\s*&\\s*Co\\s*KG|Limited))(?=\\s|,|\\.|\\(|\\)|;|:|\\n|$)",
      "priority": 9,
      "output_template": {
        "text": "$1",
        "start": "$start",
        "end": "$end",
        "type": "organisation"
      },
      "output_key": "entities",
      "reasoning": "Added a preceding word requirement ([A-Z][a-z...]+) to ensure the match is a proper name and not a common noun like 'Aktiengesellschaft'."
    },
    {
      "name": "District Court Pattern",
      "description": "Matches Bezirksgericht followed by a specific location or valid court name, excluding generic phrases like 'für' or 'werde'.",
      "format": "regex",
      "content": "(?i)\\b(?:Bezirksgericht\\s+([A-Za-zäöüÄÖÜ]+|\\w+\\s+\\w+|\\w+\\s+\\w+\\s+\\w+)|BG\\s+Bezirksgericht\\s+([A-Za-zäöüÄÖÜ]+|\\w+\\s+\\w+|\\w+\\s+\\w+\\s+\\w+))\\b",
      "priority": 8,
      "output_template": {
        "text": "$0",
        "start": "$start",
        "end": "$end",
        "type": "organisation"
      },
      "output_key": "entities",
      "reasoning": "Tightened the location pattern to require at least one word after 'Bezirksgericht' that is not a preposition like 'für' or a verb like 'werde', ensuring only valid court names are captured."
    },
    {
      "name": "Regional Court Pattern",
      "description": "Matches Landesgericht (LG) followed by a specific location, excluding generic phrases.",
      "format": "regex",
      "content": "(?i)\\b(Landesgericht\\s+([A-Za-zäöüÄÖÜ]+|\\w+\\s+\\w+|\\w+\\s+\\w+\\s+\\w+)|LG\\s+([A-Za-zäöüÄÖÜ]+|\\w+\\s+\\w+|\\w+\\s+\\w+\\s+\\w+))\\b",
      "priority": 8,
      "output_template": {
        "text": "$0",
        "start": "$start",
        "end": "$end",
        "type": "organisation"
      },
      "output_key": "entities",
      "reasoning": "Tightened the location pattern to require a valid location suffix, preventing matches on incomplete phrases."
    },
    {
      "name": "Person Name Pattern",
      "description": "Matches person names in legal contexts, specifically after 'geboren am' or in lists of names.",
      "format": "regex",
      "content": "(?i)(?:geboren\\s+am\\s+|,\\s+|und\\s+|der\\s+|die\\s+)([A-Z][a-zäöüß]+(?:\\s+[A-Z][a-zäöüß]+)+)",
      "priority": 7,
      "output_template": {
        "text": "$1",
        "start": "$start",
        "end": "$end",
        "type": "person"
      },
      "output_key": "entities",
      "reasoning": "Captures person names following common legal indicators like 'geboren am' or conjunctions, ensuring high precision for person entities."
    },
    {
      "name": "Company Name Without Suffix",
      "description": "Matches company names that do not end in a standard suffix like GmbH/AG but are clearly organizations (e.g., 'Kilincarslan Metall'), ensuring the industry term is part of the match.",
      "format": "regex",
      "content": "(?i)(?<![a-zäöüß\\s])(?<!\\w)([A-Z][a-zäöüß0-9]+(?:\\s+[A-Z][a-zäöüß0-9]+)*(?:\\s+&\\s+[A-Z][a-zäöüß0-9]+)*)\\s+(Metall|Maschinenbau|Luftfahrt|Forschung|Handel|Dienstleistungen|Verlag|Software|Cloud|Transport|Immobilien|Versicherung|Gastronomie|Medien|Planung|Bau|Energie|Automotive|Gesellschaft|Institut|Gruppe|Werke|Holding|Bank|Telekom|Post|Versand|Logistik|Touristik|Pharma|Sanitär|Getränke|Lebensmittel|Elekro|Elektronik|Druck|Medizin|Klinik|Spital|Krankenhaus|Schule|Universität|Hochschule|Firma|Unternehmen|Betrieb|Konzern)(?=\\s|,|\\.|\\(|\\)|;|:|\\n|$)",
      "priority": 8,
      "output_template": {
        "text": "$0",
        "start": "$start",
        "end": "$end",
        "type": "organisation"
      },
      "output_key": "entities",
      "reasoning": "Removed the generic 'AG/GmbH/KG' from the industry list to prevent matching generic phrases like 'klagende Gesellschaft' and ensure only specific industry terms trigger the match."
    }
  ],
  "deleted_rules": []
}
